title: Sports Supporter Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-real cinematic national sports supporter campaign poster for Japan. Crowd Scene: Tens of thousands of supporters fill Shibuya Crossing transformed into a stadium district, waving flags and scarves in white and red with clean indigo shadow accents, with banners, smoke, flares, and confetti. Hero Symbol: Above the crowd, show a giant abstract blue samurai falcon made of smoke and light as the emotional focal point. Context: final group-stage night, one match from history, designed as a world-class tournament advertising image. Atmosphere: rain mist, neon reflections, and red flare smoke, dramatic stadium or city lighting, emotional scale, patriotic energy, premium campaign finish. Typography: Large readable slogan "BLUE FIRE RISES" with country name and small match line. Safety: use fictional football campaign marks only. Restrictions: No official tournament marks, no real player likeness, no chaotic violence, no malformed flags, no random text.
